Legal

Privacy policy

Last updated January 1, 2024

Effective: January 1, 2024

This Privacy Policy describes how Dracon ("we", "us", or "our") collects, uses, and shares information when you use our Discord bot and related services.

1. Information we collect

We collect the following types of information to provide and improve our services:

  • Server data: Server IDs, channel IDs, and role IDs necessary for bot configuration.
  • User data: User IDs, usernames, and discriminators for moderation logging.
  • Message data: We do not read, store, or log message content unless explicitly required by a feature (e.g., moderation logs).
  • Action logs: Moderation actions (bans, kicks, warns) for audit purposes.

2. How we use your information

We use the information collected to:

  • Provide and operate the Dracon bot and its features.
  • Maintain moderation logs for server administrators.
  • Improve bot performance, stability, and features.
  • Respond to support requests and inquiries.
  • Enforce our Terms of Service and prevent abuse.

3. Data storage and security

Your data is stored on secure servers. We implement industry-standard security measures to protect against unauthorized access, alteration, or destruction of data. Data is retained only as long as necessary to provide our services.

Server configuration data is deleted automatically when Dracon is removed from a server. Moderation logs are retained for up to 90 days unless deleted by server administrators.

4. Data sharing

We do not sell, trade, or share your data with third parties except:

  • When required by law or legal process.
  • To protect our rights, property, or safety.
  • With service providers who assist in operating our platform (under strict confidentiality agreements).

5. Your rights

You have the right to:

  • Request access to data we hold about you.
  • Request deletion of your data.
  • Opt out of non-essential data collection.

To exercise these rights, contact us at privacy@dracon.bot.

6. Third-party services

Dracon operates through the Discord platform. By using Dracon, you also agree to Discord's Privacy Policy. We are not responsible for Discord's data practices.

7. Children's privacy

Dracon is not intended for users under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you believe a child has provided us with personal information, please contact us immediately.

8. Changes to this policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify users of significant changes through our Discord support server. Continued use of Dracon after changes constitutes acceptance of the new policy.

9. Contact us

If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at privacy@dracon.bot or join our Discord support server.

Built with ♥ by the Dracon team — © 2024 Dracon.
